title: ononis alba var. viscidula
intro: Ononis alba var. viscidula, also known as Sticky White Rest-harrow, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ononis alba var. viscidula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and act as a diuretic, making it a potential natural remedy for urinary issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat skin irritations and wounds, as well as to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation.
